---
title: "ED Fig 11d-f - EB3 length under CK-666 (DIV-3, deconvolved images)"
author: "Lin et al., Nature 2026 (Bradke lab, DZNE)"
output: html_notebook
params:
  div: 3
  image_pipeline: "decon"
  summary_variable: "growth_speed_median"
  pdf_name: "EB3_length.eps"
  d_drive_source: "D:\\DVElite\\CK666_LA_EB3\\240229_DIV3_EB3\\CK666\\decon\\read_stat.Rmd"
---

<!--
================================================================================
  Wrapper for ED Fig 11d-f, batch: DIV-3 + deconvolved.
================================================================================
  Includes canonical template at:
      ../../templates/edfig11df_eb3_length_under_ck666.Rmd

  Parameters supplied above:
    - div = 3                              -> DIV-3 stage
    - image_pipeline = "decon"             -> str_extract uses "(?<=decon/)..."
    - summary_variable = "growth_speed_median"
    - pdf_name = "EB3_length.eps"
    - d_drive_source                       -> D:\ provenance

  Original 255-line monolithic wrapper extracted into a canonical template
  on 2026-05-12. See ``templates/edfig11df_eb3_length_under_ck666.Rmd``.

  Essentiality: Replicate-QC. Canonical:
                edfig11f_eb3_tip_integrated_intensity.Rmd.
-->

```{r child = "../../templates/edfig11df_eb3_length_under_ck666.Rmd"}
```
